assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, IdentityRole>() with AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>() to register ASP.NET Identity
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Identity registration is general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddIdentityServer() followed by .AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() to bridge ASP.NET Identity to IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: AddAspNetIdentity is known from IdentityServer4 documentation and general tutorials.

assertions.assertion: Response explains that AddAspNetIdentity registers IProfileService for adding claims to tokens
assertions.rationale: The specific detail about IProfileService registration is Duende-specific internal knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes AddDefaultTokenProviders() on the ASP.NET Identity registration
assertions.rationale: AddDefaultTokenProviders is standard ASP.NET Identity setup knowledge.
